headline: Yukon Cuck 😩🇨🇦 HANTAVIRUS 😷🦠 SLAY on MV HONDY Cruise 🚢💀
text: Yukon 🍁👀 Canadian from HANTAVIRUS HIT 😷🦠 MV HONDY 🚢💥 cruise ship just TESTED POS 🍆🧪 while ISOLATING on VANCOUVER ISLAND 🍁🏝️ with THREE other former PASSENGERS 👥🛳️. The poor dude from the YUKON TERRITORY 🏔️🇨🇦 is one of SIX CANUCKS 🦫🇨🇦 on that Dutch vessel, and now he's got MILD SYMPTOMS 😩🤒 like FEVER 🔥💦, EXTREME FATIGUE 😴💤, MUSCLE ACHES 🦵🔥, STOMACH PAIN 🍔😣, VOMITING 🤮🌊 and SHORTNESS OF BREATH 😮‍💨💨. This brings TOTAL INFECTIONS to ELEVEN 1️⃣1️⃣ all among CRUISE PASSENGERS 🧳🛳️, with THREE already BITING DUST 💀👻 and TWO confirmed HANTAVIRUS VICTIMS 🦠☠️. BC HEALTH OFFICER BONNIE HENRY 🩺👩‍⚕️ says the TEST came back PRESUMPTIVE POSITIVE on FRIDAY 📅✅, still needs NATIONAL MICROBIOLOGY LAB CONFIRMATION 🔬🧬. 'Clearly NOT WHAT WE HOPED 😔 but WHAT WE PLANNED 🗓️,' she SLAYED, adding HANTAVIRUS is NO PANDEMIC THREAT 🌍🚫 unlike COVID-19 🤒🦠, FLU 🤧💉 or MEASLES 🥵📉. The SIX CANADIANS 🍁🧳 split up: TWO self-isolating in ONTARIO 🏠🇨🇦, TWO COUPLES on VANCOUVER ISLAND 🏝️💑 and the POSITIVE YUKONER 🏔️🦠 with his PARTNER. None of the OTHER FIVE have TESTED POS so far 📉😷. Ship set sail from ARGENTINA 🇦🇷 on APRIL 1st 🗓️ and finally DOCKED in TENERIFE 🏝️🇪🇸 just last week, letting 147 PASSENGERS and CREW from 23 COUNTRIES 🌍🛳️ go into 42-DAY WHO ISOLATION 😷⏳. Canadians were on 21-DAY lockdown but that could EXTEND 📈🔒 now. HANTAVIRUSES usually from RODENTS 🐭🦠 but ANDES STRAIN can SPREAD HUMAN-TO-HUMAN 🤝🦠 in SOUTH AMERICA 🌎. Risk of MAJOR OUTBREAK is VERY LOW 📉✅ says OFFICIALS 🧑‍⚕️. BONNIE DROPPING KNOWLEDGE that it's a WHOLE DIFFERENT VIRUS VIBES 🧬 vs RESPIRATORY THREATS. No PANDEMIC POTENTIAL here bby 👼🦠 just ISOLATION SLAY 🏠💪 and WATCHING FOR SYMPTOMS 👀🔥. WHO RECOMMENDS 42 DAYS of QUARANTINE like it's a BAD ROMCOM SEQUEL 📽️😷 while CANADA ADJUSTS TIMELINES 🗓️🔄. Stay SAFE out there fam, no RODENT RAVES 🐭🎉 or CRUISE SHIP CURSES 🚢💀!
